nonBlockingIssues.description: Missing is_kpf_prepub && $174 EID tracking in processSymbolReference (validation-only, no EPUB impact)
Redundant $155 EID tracking in two locations (harmless)
getOrderedImageResources is a stub awaiting position_location module (known dependency)
processContainer processes imports AND children vs Python's if/else (functionally equivalent per 394/394)
processPageUnit lacks multi-reading-order prefix for page anchors (no test books exercise this)
Simplified $146 description extraction — only extracts top-level strings, not nested styled content
Extra heading-nav-unit navUnitName clearing not in Python
Fragile $245 icon extraction assumes map structure
author_pronunciation comment says 'not needed' but it IS used in epub_output.py for alternate-script metadata
cde_content_type case is empty — book type logic handled via different path
yj_illustrated_layout doesn't set HTMLCover=true (Python does both). No test book is illustrated layout.
yj_fixed_layout doesn't distinguish pdf_backed vs non-pdf values (1/2/3)
$750 unknown layout types silently return false instead of logging error like Python
processKVGShape $270 creates empty <text> instead of full content processing (KVG/illustrated layout only)
processPath IonStruct path bundle lookup is stubbed (KVG shapes only)

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update the Python→Go file mapping table to reflect that some Python files map to multiple Go files. For example: yj_structure.py → yj_structure.go + symbol_format.go + fragments.go; yj_to_epub_misc.py → yj_to_epub_misc.go + svg.go. Future auditors need accurate mappings to find all relevant code.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: audit-yj-structure and audit-yj-to-epub-misc both found the Python code split across multiple Go files not listed in the mapping table.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document the systematic decision to skip Python's check_empty() validation function across all Go files. This function logs warnings for unexpected remaining dict keys and is debugging/validation-only. Currently each audit independently discovers this omission.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: audit-yj-to-epub-misc notes check_empty() is consistently not ported. Similar pattern in other audited files.

rejectedObservations.observation: Navigation description extraction simplification ($146) should be documented in library
rejectedObservations.reason: already-documented — the audit findings document (audit-yj-to-epub-navigation-findings.md) already covers this gap

rejectedObservations.observation: Go uses different architectural pattern for metadata access (getMetadataValue vs self.* fields)
rejectedObservations.reason: ambiguous — this is an existing architectural choice, not something that needs documentation change
